episodes.title: TUP1: The Day My Playbook Stopped Working
episodes.desc: Why moving from viewing training as an “event” to treating it as a “systemic intervention” is the key to creating lasting change — and what it took to unlearn the old way.

episodes.title: TUP2: The Day I Stopped Filling the Silence
episodes.desc: Discover why silence in a facilitated session or meeting is not a problem to fix but the moment learning and reflection actually happens. If you have ever felt the urge to jump in and rescue a room before it has had the chance to think, this episode offers a different way to show up.
